# Auric Ledger

> Auric Ledger is a free, premium web application for tracking real-time precious metal prices in Indian Rupees (INR). It provides daily price updates, interactive charts, AI-powered market summaries, portfolio simulation, price alerts, and professional PDF reports.

## Website
- URL: https://auric--ledger.vercel.app
- Category: Finance, Precious Metals, Investment Tools
- Language: English (India)
- Free to use: Yes

## Pages

### Home
- URL: https://auric--ledger.vercel.app/
- Description: Landing page with overview of all features and tools

### Market
- URL: https://auric--ledger.vercel.app/market
- Description: Live prices for Gold (24K, 22K, 18K), Silver, Platinum, Palladium, Copper, Lead, Nickel, Zinc, and Aluminium in INR. Includes 7-day and 30-day price charts, weekly data tables, price change indicators, and export tools (CSV/PDF).

### Portfolio Simulator
- URL: https://auric--ledger.vercel.app/portfolio
- Description: Virtual portfolio simulator with ₹10,00,000 starting balance. Buy and sell metals at live prices, track P&L, view trade history, and monitor performance charts.

### Calculator
- URL: https://auric--ledger.vercel.app/calculator
- Description: Metal price and purity calculator. Convert between weight units and calculate metal value at current prices.

### Compare
- URL: https://auric--ledger.vercel.app/compare
- Description: Side-by-side comparison of multiple metal prices with charts and statistics.

### News
- URL: https://auric--ledger.vercel.app/news
- Description: Latest precious metal market news aggregated from top sources.

### Summary
- URL: https://auric--ledger.vercel.app/summary
- Description: AI-powered daily market summary with insights on price movements and trends.

### Dashboard
- URL: https://auric--ledger.vercel.app/dashboard
- Description: Personal dashboard with price alerts, analytics, and portfolio overview (requires login).

### Settings
- URL: https://auric--ledger.vercel.app/settings
- Description: Customize preferences — number format, default metal, purity badges, compact numbers.

### FAQ
- URL: https://auric--ledger.vercel.app/faq
- Description: Frequently asked questions about the platform, pricing data sources, and features.

### Privacy Policy
- URL: https://auric--ledger.vercel.app/privacy
- Description: Privacy policy and data handling practices.

## Metals Tracked
- Gold (24K, 22K, 18K)
- Silver
- Platinum
- Palladium
- Copper
- Lead
- Nickel
- Zinc
- Aluminium

## Key Features
- Daily price updates at 9:00 AM IST
- Prices in Indian Rupees (INR) per gram
- Interactive ApexCharts price charts (7-day, 30-day)
- AI-generated daily market summaries
- Portfolio simulator with virtual trading
- Price alerts with browser notifications
- CSV and PDF export
- Metal price calculator
- Side-by-side metal comparison
- Dark and light theme
- PWA (installable on mobile)
- Google OAuth and email/password authentication

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React 19, Vite, ApexCharts
- Backend: Node.js, Express
- Database: Supabase PostgreSQL
- Auth: Supabase (Google OAuth + Email/Password)
- Hosting: Vercel (frontend), Render (backend)

## Contact
- Website: https://auric--ledger.vercel.app
